title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: What country would you most like to visit and why?
Have you ever experienced culture shock? Tell me about it.
Do you think it's important to learn the language of a country you visit?
What kind of traveller are you – do you plan everything or prefer to go with the flow?
How do you think travelling affects a person's outlook on life?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think travel helps break down cultural stereotypes?
Is it important to understand the history of a place before you visit it?
What's more valuable – travelling to many different places or getting to know one place very well?
